Other skills may have the same violation. The fan-out vs TeamCreate decision rule: use TeamCreate only when agents need to talk to each other during execution via SendMessage; use fan-out (individual Agent spawns) when agents work independently. Deliverable: (1) list all skills using TeamCreate, (2) verify each against the decision rule, (3) flag misuses, (4) apply approved fixes.

# Momentum Project Architecture: Comprehensive Sprint, Story, Epic & Feature Tracking Map

## Executive Summary

The Momentum project is a sophisticated solo-developer agentic engineering practice with three canonical data stores (`.momentum/sprints/index.json`, `.momentum/stories/index.json`, `.momentum/intake-queue.jsonl`) that implement a rigorous story lifecycle, sprint orchestration, and cross-sprint pattern accumulation. The architecture separates **features** (product-facing value bundles in features.json), **epics** (story containers from epics.md), and **stories** (work items in stories/index.json) as distinct but interconnected concepts. Persistent state is maintained across sessions via decision documents, handoffs, and a findings ledger for practice improvement.

---
